name: agentic-setup
description: Agentic-setup ecosystem: a verification engine + rule-pack, a generative adversarial-review red-team, and AC-oriented workflow/team progress tracking. Three composable, self-contained Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: adversarial-review
plugins.description: Generative red-team (Mode-2) adversarial review of any artifact — extracts intent, runs grounded critic lenses (Skeptic/Architect/Minimalist), synthesizes a severity-rated advisory soft-gate report. Standalone, no plugin dependencies.

plugins.name: verify-suite
plugins.description: Verification engine + durable acceptance-criteria rule-pack, the verify-* review-skill family, and artifact-flow routing for spec/design/task/research-note quality gating. Depends on adversarial-review for its Mode-2 generative pass.

plugins.name: workflow-tracking
plugins.description: AC-oriented multi-step workflow & agent-team progress tracking: bundles the task-tool MCP, a workflow-tracking guidance skill, and an advisory advance-gate nudge hook. Standalone.
